title: Cross-repo LIVE evidence lane (optional; not a CI gate)

e2e.summary: REAL journey passed: pair (device flow) approved via the real /settings/devices page -> serve -> presence flips 'Ponte ligada' through registry->status->poll (no stubs anywhere) -> honest grants-unavailable vs the pre-C1/C2/C3 daemon -> real grant minted. Chat file-read leg annotated not-run (model credential absent, LIVE_MODEL gate)

ciLane.summary: lane green; live spec skips cleanly without LIVE_BRIDGE (ledger-scoped)

review.notes: expected daemon-unreachable console errors scoped; temp homes cleaned; annotation (not test.skip) keeps steps 1-5 as reported evidence

blockers.name: model-credential-absent
blockers.cause: chat file-read leg needs a live model credential (same external blocker the 20260710 run recorded)
blockers.remediation: export CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=$(claude setup-token) && node .claude/skills/run-ekoa-code/provision-credential.mjs; then LIVE_MODEL=1 node scripts/e2e-live-bridge.mjs
blockers.impact: one lane leg annotated not-run; the rest of the journey is real passed evidence
